meta.title: Why air-to-air dogfights aren’t going anywhere
meta.description:
With at least two next-generation fighter programs now drawing funds from Pentagon coffers, there's one looming question dominating the airspace over internet forums, the world's military installations and advanced aviation research facilities alike: are dogfights really dead?

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews

📱 Follow Alex Hollings on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexHollings52
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexhollingswrites
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AlexHollingsWrites

Further Reading:
America's NGAD fighter might be nothing like you think: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/ngad-fighter/
What kind of fighter could the latest military tech really build?: 
https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/what-kind-of-fighter-could-the-latest-military-tech-really-build/
We'll be publishing the article this video is based on, as well as articles about the dogfights over Vietnam and the F-35 vs F-16 report all in the coming weeks! 

Citations:
CRS Report on the NGAD: https://sgp.fas.org/crs/weapons/IF11659.pdf
2015 F-35 vs F-16 Report: https://medium.com/war-is-boring/test-pilot-admits-the-f-35-can-t-dogfight-cdb9d11a875
Col. Berke interview on Business Insider: https://www.businessinsider.com/f35-pilot-f-35-can-excel-dogfighting-2017-1
Rick Scheff quote: https://theaviationgeekclub.com/usaf-f-16-pilot-explains-why-he-would-rather-fly-the-f-35-in-combat-than-the-f-22-even-in-a-war-against-russia-or-china/
Ward Carroll on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/WardCarroll
Desert Storm air-to-air kills: http://www.rjlee.org/air/ds-aakill/By%20Weapon/
"Trends in air-to-air combat: Implications for future air superiority": https://csbaonline.org/uploads/documents/Air-to-Air-Report-.pdf
Rand Corporation analysis: https://www.rand.org/content/dam/rand/pubs/papers/2009/P7837.pdf
